channel.title: 中国日报-娱乐
channel.description: 中国日报-娱乐 RSS Feed

item.title: Actress Tang Yan poses for fashion magazine
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Actress Tang Yan poses for fashion magazine

item.title: Actor Huang Xuan poses for fashion magazine
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Actor Huang Xuan poses for fashion magazine

item.title: Fashion queen Angelababy releases fashion photos
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Fashion queen Angelababy releases fashion photos

item.title: Hong Kong actor Shawn Yue announces surprise wedding
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Hong Kong actor and singer Shawn Yue shared a photo from his wedding ceremony on the social media platform Instagram and officially tied the knot Dec 5, 2017.

item.title: Gaming industry opens a whole new chapter
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Zhang Wenxiu loved reading Zhu Xian, or Jade Dynasty, the smash-hit supernatural novel which created a stir online.

item.title: The plot thickens for online literary companies
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Stories from aspiring authors are now read by millions of users on the internet before being turned into movies, TV series and games.

item.title: Playlist
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Television viewers and those familiar with people on the autism spectrum agree: The Good Doctor is a good show.

item.title: Velvet shimmers and shines this winter
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: As one of the most fashionable items in autumn and winter, velvet is formally back as dresses, jumpers and suits.

item.title: Eight stars dazzle in Vogue's last issue for 2017
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Eight stars dazzle in Vogueâs last issue for 2017

item.title: Actor Chen Kun poses for fashion magazine
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Actor Chen Kun poses for fashion magazine.

item.title: Singer He Jie poses for fashion magazine
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Singer He Jie poses for fashion magazine

item.title: Highlights of 2017 British Fashion Awards
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Highlights of 2017 British Fashion Awards

item.title: Celebrities and leaders show love and care for children and mothers
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: The first âChina and the World: For Children and Mothersâ gala night was held on Nov 29 at Bvlgari Hotel Beijing. The glamorous event was organized by the United Nations Every Woman Every Child China Partnership Network and the China Friendship Foundation for Peace and Development, and supported by the Chinese Peopleâs Association for Friendship with Foreign Countries and Save the Children.

item.title: Chinese rappers to go on a countrywide tour
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Chinese rappers join a national tour, the Door & Key Hip-Hop Tour, which kicks off from Beijing's Cadillac Arena on Dec 3.

item.title: National treasures come alive on latest TV show
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: A large-scale cultural exploration program National Treasure made its debut on Channel 3 of China Central Television on Sunday night.

item.title: Actor-singer Yi Yangqianxi poses for the fashion magazine
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Actor-singer Yi Yangqianxi poses for the fashion magazine

item.title: Find a proper plastic bag to heal yourself in the new year
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: As the fashion industry can create all sorts of unexpected fads, plastic bags and bags shaped like them will be the new beloved ones in 2018.

item.title: New stills of 'Youth' released
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: New stills of 'Youth' released

item.title: 4th Silk Road International Film Festival concludes in Fujian
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Chinese actor Jacky Chan attends the closing ceremony of the 4th Silk Road International Film Festival in Fuzhou city, East China's Fujian province, Dec 3, 2017.

item.title: Chinese stars delight the 2017 Tencent Video Star Awards
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Chinese stars delight the 2017 Tencent Video Star Awards

item.title: 'Big Fish and Begonia' wins at international animation festival
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: The animation by Chinese director Liang Xuan and Zhang Chun "Big Fish and Begonia" won the first prize of the full-length film category of the 15th Anilogue International Animation Festival here on Dec 3.

item.title: Fashion icon Liu Yifei poses for fashion magazine
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Fashion icon Liu Yifei poses for fashion magazine

item.title: Acrobats inject life into folk art
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Born in a county where more than 20,000 people are skilled acrobats, Yin Bo has spent most of his life performing around the country.

item.title: Fur shoes step into limelight
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: As colorful fur coat made a comeback this winter, shoes with fluffy fur will grab the limelight in the coming New Year.

item.title: Best bets
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Since making their full-length debut with 2012's multiplatinum Night Visions, Imagine Dragons have drawn worldwide adoration for their anthemic yet moody alt-rock.

item.title: Chinese production set to create history on Broadway
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Shanghai Hengyuanxiang (HYX) Drama Development Company and Nederlander Worldwide Entertainment signed a deal on Nov 6 that would see Shimmer become the first Chinese musical to have an openended run on Broadway.

item.title: Shanghai loves musicals
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: A slew of famous Broadway productions will be hitting town next year as theaters seek to satisfy a growing appetite for foreign shows.

item.title: Slovak sax quartet makes China debut
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Slovak saxophone quartet Saxophone Syncopators made their debut show in China by performing at the capital's Minzu Theater on Dec 1.

item.title: Singer Li Yuchun releases fashion shots for music tour
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Singer Li Yuchun releases fashion shots for music tour

item.title: Supermodel Xi Mengyao poses for the fashion magazine
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Supermodel Xi Mengyao poses for the fashion magazine.

item.title: New stills of 'The Monkey King 3'released
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: New stills of 'The Monkey King 3'released

item.title: Chinese stars shine at the&nbsp;2017&nbsp;L'officiel Fashion Night
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Chinese actress Liu Yifei poses as she arrives at the red carpet for the L'officiel Fashion Night 2017 in Beijing, China, Nov 29, 2017.

item.title: Chinese singer releases an album reflecting on the past decade
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Wang Xi gave himself the English name Elvis to pay homage to his music idol, Elvis Presley.

item.title: Colorful fur coats back in vogue
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: As it gets colder day by day, more people are turning to down garments to stay warm. Yet there are more posh choices that can protect you from bitter cold: fur coats.

item.title: Online celebrity&nbsp;animals of 2017
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: This hilarious image shows red squirrels displaying their musical skills on mini musical instruments. The critters looked like they could be driving their woodland neighbors nuts with violins, guitars, saxophones and even a little drum kit.

item.title: Chinese actress Liu Yifei to play Mulan in Disney's live-action adaptation
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Chinese actress Liu Yifei is set to star as the titular female warrior in Disney's live-action adaptation of the classic Chinese epic, Mulan.

item.title: Actor Xu Weizhou poses for fashion magazine
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Actor Xu Weizhou poses for fashion magazine

item.title: New stills of 'The Thousand Faces of Dunjia' released
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: New stills of 'The Thousand Faces of Dunjia' released

item.title: Actress Zhang Tianai poses for fashion magazine
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Actress Zhang Tianai poses for fashion magazine.

item.title: Shunji Iwai's film based on real-life incidents
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Japanese filmmaker Shunji Iwai still clearly remembers an afternoon when he was in second grade.

item.title: Huayi Brothers' big plans for small screen
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Huayi Brothers Media Corp, a major factor in the rise of some of China's most popular film celebrities like director Feng Xiaogang and actress Li Bingbing, recently announced plans to expand its influence among television viewers.

item.title: Back in spotlight
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: The centuries-old art form of pingshu, or storytelling, is making a welcome return to television after a long hiatus. Xu Fan reports.

item.title: Broadway musical 'Legally Blonde' to be staged in Beijing
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: The Broadway musical Legally Blonde will be staged in Beijing from Jan 10 to 14 at the Poly Theater.

item.title: Fashion trend: Learn from&nbsp;female celebrities with bold red lips
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: There's a saying going around fashion circles: âEverything can be solved by a lipstick; if it still doesnât work well, then you should use two.â

item.title: Actor Liu Haoran poses for fashion magazine
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Actor Liu Haoran poses for fashion magazine

item.title: Fashion queen Angelababy releases fashion photos
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Fashion queen Angelababy releases fashion photos

item.title: Li Yifeng and Ju Xiaowen pose for fashion magazine
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Li Yifeng and Ju Xiaowen pose for fashion magazine

item.title: Four Victoria's Secret angels spotted in fashion party
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Four Victoria's Secret angels spotted in fashion party

item.title: Chinese directors visit Hollywood
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: China Filmmaker Summit, a program organized by the State Administration of Press, Publication, Radio, Film and Television, China's top sectoral regulator, and the Hollywood studio 20th Century Fox, was recently held in the United States where some rising Chinese directors viewed advanced filming technologies.

item.title: Miner's story inspires film
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Award-winning actor Duan Yihong has recently become a familiar face in crime thrillers.

item.title: All-star cast assembled for Guo Degang's directorial debut
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: A dream cast might not be available to most newbie directors, but cross-talk comedian Guo Degang has assembled a cast of up to 33 stars for his directorial debut, The Face of Gene.

item.title: Paopao Family turns two
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Paopao Family, an online community of fans of young idols in China, celebrated its second anniversary on Nov 22 in Beijing.

item.title: Crime thriller 'Manhunt' brings three firsts for Fukuyama
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Japanese star Masaharu Fukuyama once enthralled Chinese fans with his renditions of songs in Tokyo Love Story, the most popular Japanese TV series airing on the Chinese mainland during the mid-1990s.

item.title: The first China-Indonesia film project launched in Jakarta
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: The first China-Indonesia co-produced film project Tsunami was initiated Nov 27 in Jakarta, capital of Indonesia.

item.title: Fashion design in Mongolian style
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: The 14th Mongolian Costume Arts Festival kicked off in Hohhot, North China's Inner Mongolia autonomous region, on Nov 27.

item.title: Model Qin Shupei poses for fashion magazine
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Model Qin Shupei poses for fashion magazine

item.title: Actress Ni Ni releases fashin photos
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Actress Ni Ni releases fashin photos

item.title: Highest Paid Models of 2017 includes Chinese model Liu Wen
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: In the latest release of the Worldâs Highest Paid Models of 2017 by Forbes, an American business magazine well-known for its lists and rankings, Chinese model Liu Wen remains at the No. 8 position with an amazing income of $6.5 million.

item.title: Zhou Xun and Hu Ge pose for fashion magazine
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Zhou Xun and Hu Ge pose for fashion magazine.

item.title: American actress Meghan Markle to be a new kind of royal
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: She is an entertainment figure in her own right, and an outspoken woman comfortable talking about her background and her passions. American actress Meghan Markle will be a new type of royal when she weds Prince Harry in the spring.

item.title: Dramatic effect
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Propelled by the success of Wolf Warrior 2 - this year's fifth-highest-grossing movie worldwide - China's box-office takings have exceeded 50 billion yuan ($7.58 billion) for the first time, a historic annual high.

item.title: 'Sky In Their Eyes' debuts late on friday
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: A music and dance performance, called "Sky In Their Eyes: The Antelope in a Vanishing Landscape", had been performed live for the very first time on the night of November 24 at the Raphael Room at London's famous V and A museum as part of Friday Late: Sino Flux, a celebration of the contemporary art, design, sounds and states of China.

item.title: Actress Gulnezer Bextiyar poses for fashion magazine
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Actress Gulnezer Bextiyar poses for fashion magazine

item.title: Actress Carina Lau poses for fashion magazine
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Actress Carina Lau poses for fashion magazine

item.title: Actress Michelle Chen poses for fashion magazine
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Actress Michelle Chen poses for fashion magazine

item.title: 54th Golden Horse Awards concludes in Taipe
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Chinese actor Tu Men kisses actress Kara Wai's hand with their awards for media for Best Leading Actor and Actress respectively at the 54th Golden Horse Awards in Taipei city, China, Nov 25, 2017. The Golden Horse awards are the Chinese-language film industry's biggest annual events.

item.title: Chinese TV shows win foreign fans
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: With the fantasy series Tribes and Empires: Story of Prophecy soon to be aired in South Korea, the United States and Canada, China will have a new hit to be fancied by foreign audiences.

item.title: Chinese pianist tells range of stories in music
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Zhang Haochen, the youngest gold medal winner of the Van Cliburn International Piano Competition, made his Carnegie Hall solo debut on Nov 18 in New York, treating the audience to a wide-ranging program of classics.

item.title: Hip-hop hero
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Sichuan rapper and winner of online reality show donates prize money of 1 million yuan to promote music education in his hometown.

item.title: 2017 Miss Chinese Toronto Pageant final in Toronto
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Tiffany Choi, 23 years old, was crowned the 2017 Miss Chinese Toronto on Friday.

item.title: Briefly in fashion
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Briefly in fashion

item.title: Chengdu gets Chanel touch
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: When China becomes an important market for luxury companies, some of them invite Chinese customers to fly abroad for their shows, while others bring their shows to local customers.

item.title: Inspired by Chinese ink
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: An installation by artist Ma Wen on display in Beijing pays tribute to what has been the main medium of expression and communication for centuries in China.

item.title: Young pianist draws inspiration from Rachmaninoff
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: In 1897, Russian composer Sergei Rachmaninoff's Symphony No.1 in D Minor was poorly received at its premier in St. Petersburg. The critical failure, as well as his relationship problems, made the composer doubt himself.

item.title: Zhang Ziyi spotted in promotional event
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Zhang Ziyi spotted in promotional event

item.title: Top actress Li Bingbing spotted in fashion event
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Top actress Li Bingbing spotted in fashion event

item.title: Actors delight 2017 Esquire annual ceremony
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Actors delight 2017 Esquire annual ceremony

item.title: 2017 Shanghai Haute Couture Week: Grace Chen
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: A model displays a new creation at the fashion show of Grace Chen during the 2017 Shanghai Haute Couture Week in Shanghai, China, November 22, 2017.

item.title: Pop star Dilraba Dilmurat poses for fashion magazine
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Pop star Dilraba Dilmurat poses for fashion magazine

item.title: Iconic moments from Victoria's Secret Fashion Show
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: The annual Victoria's Secret Fashion show has just concluded this month. As usual, it has generated animated discussions on social media platforms at home and abroad.

item.title: Chinese classic going strong as opera
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: As a Canadian classical music impresario, Wray Armstrong might cut an unlikely figure in the projection of China's soft power.

item.title: Top actress Zhou Xun poses for fashion magazine
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Top actress Zhou Xun poses for fashion magazine

item.title: Actor Chen Kun poses for fashion magazine
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Actor Chen Kun poses for fashion magazine

item.title: Actor Aarif Lee poses for fashion magzine
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Actor Aarif Lee poses for fashion magzine

item.title: Singer launches charity project
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Chinese singer Zhou Yanhong recently joined dozens of celebrities at Beijing's Shijia Primary School to unveil a charity project to help left-behind children and underprivileged college students.

item.title: American Melodies
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: The Last of the Mohicans - the soundtrack of the 1992 film by the same title, starring Daniel Day-Lewis - was composed by Trevor Jones and Randy Edelman.

item.title: Buzz among film buffs as Chinese thriller shines at Tokyo festival
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Director Dong Yue's first feature film, The Looming Storm, recently won two top awards - for best actor and best artistic contribution - at the 30th Tokyo International Film Festival, leading to a buzz among crime noir fans.

item.title: Dong Chorus
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: As night falls, a young man takes a wooden ladder and leans it against a closed window on the second floor of a house. Playing a guitar-like instrument, he sings romantic lyrics as his beloved looks on from the other side of the window.

item.title: Kris Wu spotted in fashion event
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Chinese singer Kris Wu or Wu Yifan poses at the Bvlgari Festa event in Beijing, China, Nov 16, 2017.

item.title: Actress Jing Tian poses for fashion magazine
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Actress Jing Tian poses for fashion magazine

item.title: Actor Ma Tianyu poses for fashion magazine
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Actor Ma Tianyu poses for fashion magazine

item.title: China-EU film fest enthralls audience in Brussels
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: The China-EU Film Festival concluded its third installment today in Brussels, and those in attendance felt it was the best one yet.

item.title: Playlist
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: US band Weezer doesn't always get the credit it deserves as it makes everything look so easy.

item.title: Art draws the Singer's attention
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: About two years ago, Singaporean singer-songwriter Stefanie Sun picked up painting. It was part of the national movement, called SkillsFuture, which provides Singaporeans aged 25 and above with an initial $500 of SkillsFuture Credit to develop their potential.

item.title: Zhang Yimou heads program to support young directors
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Film director Zhang Yimou has been appointed chairman of the third China Film Directors' Guild Young Director Support Program, according to the organizers.

item.title: New drama charts changing life in Beijing
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: For the award-winning actor and scriptwriter Guo Jinglin, his most impressive memories of Beijing date back to the 1970s.

item.title: New comedy hopes to make a killing
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: A familiar face in many Hong Kong comedies, veteran actor Eric Tsang returns to his comfort zone with his role in the upcoming feature Kill Me Please.

item.title: Tianqiao marks second year as musical hub
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: The Tianqiao Performing Arts Center celebrated its second anniversary in Beijing.

item.title: China's box office earning crosses $7.5b this year
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: China's box office exceeded 50 billion yuan ($7.5 billion) Monday, the first year the country has broken the 50-billion mark, according to the State Administration of Press, Publication, Radio, Film and Television (SAPPRFT).

item.title: Pop singer Jolin Tsai releases fashion photos
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Pop singer Jolin Tsai releases fashion photos

item.title: Actor Xu Weizhou spotted in 2017 Victoria's Secret Fashion Show
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Actor Xu Weizhou spotted in 2017 Victoria's Secret Fashion Show

item.title: Fashion queen Angelababy releases fashion photos
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Fashion queen Angelababy releases fashion photos

item.title: Local opera takes to a new stage
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: As an oil painter who is also a fan of Ganju Opera, Yu Xiaofei reveals the charm of Chinese traditional culture using Western painting techniques.

item.title: Guo Pei: China's timeless haute couturier
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: For many people, the fashion world is a place where fame meets fortune. Tall, slim supermodels strut elegantly in clothes decorated in gold and silver; luxury goods are produced from this array of fancy attire and subsequently brought into the market, leading the trends of each season. Paris, the world's fashion capital, has become the place to be for many aspiring designers.

item.title: Comfortable chic in cold: White puffer coats
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: A warm puffer coat is what everyone needs to ward off the chilly winds as temperatures drop to below zero. But the question is: how to keep warm but stay slender and chic at the same time in the gloomy winter days? The color of white is a solution.

item.title: Actress Zhao Liying releases fashion photos
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Actress Zhao Liying releases fashion photos

item.title: Fashion queen Zhang Ziyi spotted in talent show
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Fashion queen Zhang Ziyi spotted in talent show

item.title: Model He Sui poses for fashion magazine
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Model He Sui poses for fashion magazine

item.title: Music streaming giants forge partnership to boost Chinese music
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Music streaming giants NetEase Cloud Music and KKBOX recently announced plans to establish a strategic relationship to promote Chinese music across the world.

item.title: Festival shines spotlight on accordion music
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: When accordion player Klaudiusz Baran, the rector of the Fryderyk Chopin University of Music in Warsaw, premiered Polish composer Marcin Blazewicz's Concerto for Accordion and String Orchestra in Beijing along with the symphony orchestra of the Central Conservatory of Music and its conductor Yu Feng, they received long ovation from the audience.

item.title: Victoria's Secret models gather before big show
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Victoria's Secret models pose for a picture during the 2017 Victoria's Secret Fashion Show's model group appearance event in Shanghai, Nov 18, 2017.

item.title: French connection
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Christian Dior is reaching for the stars with its stylish new Shanghai flagship boutique

item.title: China's music market now marching to a new beat
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: For years, China's music industry was seen as chaotic with record companies seemingly unable to come up with digital business models which could fight online piracy.

item.title: Reunion with a difference
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: On a chilly autumn night in Beijing, Ye Bei and a group of musician friends meet to celebrate Ye's latest album with a concert

item.title: Screen treats ahead for English stage-production fans
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: The National Theater Live is returning to China in 2018, with more screenings of sellout English stage productions.

item.title: Night belongs to the youngï¼and so does the sound
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Ten years ago just 10 music festivals were held in China. How things have changed

item.title: Stefanie Sun releases new MV
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Stefanie Sun releases new MV

item.title: Charm from the past: Students experience Qinqiang Opera
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: An actress of traditional Chinese Qinqiang Opera prepares for performance at the Yisu Theater, a century-old theater in Xi'an, Northwest China's Shaanxi province, on Nov 15, 2017. About 100 international students from Peking University's Yenching Academy are touring the city as part of their Chinese history and culture studies.

item.title: Wang Yuan shares his experience in child-friendly schools
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Singer and actor Wang Yuan, member of Chinese boy group TFBoys, attends a press conference for his visit to child-friendly schools in Sanjiang county in South China's Guangxi Zhuang autonomous region as UNICEF's Special Advocate for Education, in Beijing, China, November 13, 2017.

item.title: Fashion icon Yang Mi poses for fashion magazine
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Fashion icon Yang Mi poses for fashion magazine

item.title: Actress Li Bingbing spotted in fashion event
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Actress Li Bingbing spotted in fashion event

item.title: Chinese and German filmmakers aim to learn from each other
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Imagine this, you are a member of a jury, and sitting in the center of the court room is a fighter pilot who is on trial for murder. He has shot down a hijacked civilian jet, killing 164 passengers on board, to stop Islamic terrorists from crashing it into a stadium with 70,000 civilians.

item.title: Tencent has plenty in store for online video fans
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Fans of King of Glory, Tencent Holding Ltd's top-grossing mobile game, will have a new pastime in Decemberï¼the game-adapted variety show Wang Zhe Chu Ji (The Ace Valor), where 20 Chinese players in parallel with the game characters will have "five versus five" battles.

item.title: Li Yundi joins a classical force
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Chinese pianist teams up with German orchestra Staatskapelle Dresden to round off China tour.

item.title: Fans can look forward to Liu Jian's latest animation film
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Film director Liu Jian is by no means talkative. Liu, who was invited to the opening ceremony of the fifth Festival of German Cinema in China in Beijing on Friday as chief guest, spoke just five sentences in his opening speech.

item.title: Seeking&nbsp;to collaborate
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Australian movie and TV producers unveil projects combining Chinese and Australian elements. Xu Fan reports.

item.title: Are traditional martial arts losing their luster?
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: A thin, bony guy walked into a building, each story heavily guarded. On the first floor alone there were five martial arts masters, ranging from Olympic boxing champion Zou Shiming to world-famous action movie star Tony Jaa.

item.title: China-Russia music festival to debut in May
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: The first China-Russia Music Festival will be held in Beijing in May, the festival's initiator, Russian actress Anikieva Selena, announced at the Russian embassy in Beijing on Monday.

item.title: Hit Chinese novel as online series
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Upcoming Chinese series Tribes and Empires: Storm of Prophecy, adapted from the hit novel of the same name, will run on the streaming sites Youku, iQiyi and Tencent from Tuesday.

item.title: China International Ballet Season underway in Beijing
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Good news for lovers of ballet in Beijing! The Third China International Ballet Season is now underway in the Chinese capital. The opening gala at the Tianqiao Theater involved stars from several global ballet companies.

item.title: Actress Zhou Xun spotted in red lip
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Actress Zhou Xun spotted in red lip

item.title: Angelababy releases fashion photos
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Angelababy releases fashion photos

item.title: Actress Song Qian poses for fashion magazine
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Actress Song Qian poses for fashion magazine

item.title: Boost for young musicians
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: A concert gala of the second China Youth Music Competition, based on the format of a contest in Germany, has just been staged in Beijing.

item.title: Amazon to produce 'Lord of the Rings' television series
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Amazon has bought the global television rights to The Lord of the Rings, the company announced Monday, in what may be its biggest and most expensive move yet to draw viewers to its streaming and shopping club Prime.

item.title: Chinese hip-hop singers make UK debut in Manchester
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: As hip-hop catches on in China, three of its most hyped home-grown rap singers are making their UK debut in Manchester.

item.title: Awards, rewards for best online jokers
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Sina Weibo, one of China's largest social networks, announced it would team up with the Beijing-based firm Joy Entertainment to honor the best online jokes in Beijing on Tuesday.

item.title: Actress Zhao Liying releases fashion photos
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Actress Zhao Liying releases fashion photos

item.title: Pop star Dilraba Dilmurat poses for fashion magazine
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Pop star Dilraba Dilmurat poses for fashion magazine

item.title: Actor Yo Yang poses for fashion magazine
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Actor Yo Yang poses for fashion magazine

item.title: German film festival tours China
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: The 5th Festival of German Cinema in China, a key annual Sino-German cultural communications event, raised its curtain in Beijing on Nov 10.

item.title: Honrn's spring/summer collection released in Beijing
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Chinese fashion company Honrn released its 2018 spring/summer collection at a runway show during China Fashion Week in Beijing last week.

item.title: A new 'Shangri-La' in Ma Yanli's runway show
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Model-turned designer Ma Yanli held a runway show last week in Beijing to release her latest haute couture collection for 2018 spring/summer.

item.title: A new 'Shangri-La' in Ma Yanli's runway show
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Model-turned designer Ma Yanli held a runway show last week in Beijing to release her latest haute couture collection for 2018 spring/summer.

item.title: Hollywood and China see a future for co-productions
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: In response to the agreement between China and the United States to encourage cross-cultural, people-to-people exchanges, U.S. and Chinese filmmakers are gearing up to jump into the fray.

item.title: Actress Gong Li spotted in Beijing
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Chinese actress Gong Li attends a promotional event for Roberto Cavalli in Beijing, China, November 10, 2017.

item.title: Taylor Swift releases new MV
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Taylor Swift releases new MV

item.title: Actress Ni Ni poses for fashion magazine
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Actress Ni Ni poses for fashion magazine

item.title: 2017 MTV European Music Awards opens in London
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Chinese singer Huo Zun wins the award of Best Chinese Artist at the MTV European Music Awards 2017 in London, Sunday, Nov 12, 2017.

item.title: Tianjin festival offers a feast for city's opera fans
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: In 1978, the China National Opera House staged Giuseppe Verdi's opera La Traviata, which was conducted by Zheng Xiaoying in Tianjin.

item.title: Music with meaning
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Fang Qiong, a renowned singer and professor at the Shanghai Conservatory of Music, presents a concert in Beijing, with ancient poetry in focus.

item.title: Star-studded 2017 Tmall Double Eleven Global Shopping Festival gala show
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Highlights of 2017 Tmall Double Eleven Global Shopping Festival gala show

item.title: 2017 Fall/Winter fashion trend: Paolo Sebastian dressing style
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: A model showcases a design on the runway at the fashion show of Paolo Sebastian during the 2017 Paris Haute Couture Fashion Week.

item.title: Liu Yifei promotes new film
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Actress Liu Yifei arrives in Hangzhou, capital of North China's Zhejiang province, Nov 11, 2017, for the publicity of the new film Rescuing Flying Tiger.

item.title: Actor Huang Jingyu poses for fashion magazine
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Actor Huang Jingyu poses for fashion magazine

item.title: Pop singer Jolin Tsai poses for fashion magazine
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Pop singer Jolin Tsai poses for fashion magazine

item.title: Chinese comedy film 'Never Say Die' wins box office success
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Chinese films are increasingly enjoying box office success. The Chinese comedy Never Say Die has brought in an impressive $326 million worldwide to date, marking another triumph after Wolf Warriors II piled up $877 million.

item.title: Building a music bridge between China, US
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: A euphonic flow of traditional Chinese music Jasmine flower leaked out of a classroom of the Valparaiso University in the northwestern part of the US state of Indiana. A Chinese yangqin teacher was instructing a US student on the traditional Chinese musical instrument, a hammered dulcimer.

item.title: Chinese musicians bring music to Philadelphia communities
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Long-standing strategic partnership hopes to give US citizens access to young Chinese artists playing their music and Western works.

item.title: What's on in Beijing (Nov 11-17)
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Discover the best things to do in Beijing with our weekly roundup of art and exhibitions, music and performances, and trending activities to do around town.

item.title: Li Quan to play Blue Note Beijing
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Chinese singer-songwriter Li Quan will play a show at Blue Note Beijing on Nov 16, with his band, which features jazz pianist Huang Jianyi, double bass player Ren Yuqing, trumpet player Hu Danfeng, saxophonist Li Shihai and percussionist An Yu. Li will perform a remix of his pop hits in a jazz style.

item.title: Actor Xu Weizhou poses for fashion magazine
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Actor Xu Weizhou poses for the fashion magazine.

item.title: Actress Tang Wei poses for fashion magazine
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Actress Tang Wei poses for fashion magazine

item.title: Kiss me little, kiss me long
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Like a lover, a lipstick should never leave you â until you decide to remove it.

item.title: Highlights of 2018 Chanel resort collection fashion show
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: A model displays a new creation during the 2018 Chanel resort collection fashion show in Chengdu city, Southwest China's Sichuan province, November 7, 2017.

item.title: Fashion queen Zhang Ziyi releases fashion photos
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Fashion queen Zhang Ziyi releases fashion photos

item.title: Comedy film's release timed for Singles Day
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: The comedy film Two Wrongs Make A Right opens to the public in China's mainland today.

item.title: From 2001 to 2017, memories of 'Meteor Garden'
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: On August 12, 2001, a mega-hit Taiwanese drama called Meteor Garden was born.

item.title: Chinese government gives push to music industry
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: During the fourth Music Industry Forum held on Nov 3, the State Administration of Press, Publication, Radio, Film and Television claimed a series of promotions will be given to the Chinese music industry in the future.

item.title: Rare jade and agate now on show
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: A collection of rare jade and agate is on show at the 2017 International Jewelry Exhibition in Beijing through Nov 13.

item.title: 'Miss Julie' wins top award at drama festival for Beijing colleges
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: The closing ceremony of the 6th Beijing College Students Drama Festival was held at the Central Academy of Drama in Beijing on Nov 7.

item.title: 'Panda vs. Aliens' hitting theaters around the world next year
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: A new animated film that will feature a Chinese panda as the movieâs hero will meet global audiences in July of next year.

item.title: 2017 China Fashion Week:Ground Show
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: A model showcases a design on the runway at the Ground Show night fashion show during the China Fashion Week Spring/Summer 2018 at the Beijing Hotel on November 7, 2017, Beijing, China.

item.title: 2017 China Fashion Week: Hu Sheguang
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: A model displays a new creation at the fashion show of Hu Sheguang during the China Fashion Week Spring/Summer 2018 in Beijing, China, November 7, 2017.

item.title: Li Yuchun releases new MV
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Li Yuchun releases new MV

item.title: Model He Sui releases fashion photos
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Model He Sui releases fashion photos.

item.title: Teen actor-singer Wang Yuan poses for the fashion magazine
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Teen actor-singer Wang Yuan poses for the fashion magazine

item.title: Celebrities delight 2018 Chanel resort collection fashion show
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Ma Sichun, Liu Haoran, Zhang Yu, CEO of the fashion magazine Vogue China, Zhou Xun and Xin Zhilei take a photo at the 2018 Chanel resort collection fashion show in Chengdu city, Southwest China's Sichuan province, November 7, 2017.

item.title: 10 masterpieces in traditional Peking Opera repertoire
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Peking Opera, with a history of more than 200 years, is one of China's major traditional art forms. Combining instrumental music, vocal performances, mime, dance and acrobatics, it has been inscribed into the UNESCO Intangible World Heritage list since 2010.

item.title: TIFF brings 'Ten Best' showcase to Beijing
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Soon after Canadian director Denis Villeneuve's blockbuster Blade Runner 2049 saw its Chinese release in late October, his Academy Award-nominated film Incendies was seen by audiences in Beijing on Nov 3.

item.title: Revolutionary drama receives mixed reviews
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Over the past three decades, Hong Kong singer-actor Aaron Kwok has starred in more than 50 movies and has picked up more than 100 music awards.

item.title: Perfecting the art of murder
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: After the success of Dunkirk, Kenneth Branagh returns to Chinese cinemas with a remake of an Agatha Christie classic.

item.title: Jack Ma pulls a stunt
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: The Alibaba founder, also a martial arts buff, is making his debut in a 20-minute movie, which will be screened partially at a TV gala on Friday.

item.title: 'Thor: Ragnarok' tops Chinese box office
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Marvel's Thor: Ragnarok dominated the Chinese film market during its debut week ending Nov 5, earning 337 million yuan (50.8 million US dollars), China Film News reported Tuesday.

item.title: Rongchang ramie show shines in Beijing Fashion Week
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: A fashion show featuring Rongchang ceramics and ramie hit the stage of the Beijing Fashion Week last Friday to showcase the city's long and brilliant history.

item.title: Full empowderment for an impeccable porcelain complexion
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: The century-old French cosmetics and perfume house Caron opens its doors to China Daily Lifestyle Premium for an exclusive visit. Enter the magic world of powder and get an impeccable porcelain complexion.

item.title: Xi Mengyao spotted in 2018 Chanel Resort fashion show
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Chinese model Xi Mengyao, better known as Meng Xi, takes part in the Chanel Resort 2018 Collection fashion show in Chengdu city, Southwest China's Sichuan province, November 7, 2017.

item.title: Actor Deng Lun poses for the fashion magazine
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Actor Deng Lun poses for the fashion magazine.

item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Actress Zhou Xun poses for fashion magazine.

item.title: 2017 China Fashion Week: Ne-tiger
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: A model displays a new creation at the fashion show of Ne-tiger during the China Fashion Week Spring/Summer 2018 in Beijing, China, November 5, 2017.

item.title: 2017 China Fashion Week:Rongchang
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: A model displays a new creation at the fashion show of Rongchang grass clothing by Zhang Yichao during the China Fashion Week Spring/Summer 2018 in Beijing, China, November 6, 2017.

item.title: 2017 China Fashion Week: Minichoc
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: A model displays a new creation at the fashion show of Minichoc during the China Fashion Week Spring/Summer 2018 in Beijing, China, November 5, 2017.

item.title: Actor Huang Xuan promotes top furniture maker
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Fresh from promoting Chen Kaige's upcoming film Legend of the Demon Cat in Tokyo, A-list actor Huang Xuan was in Beijing to unravel his new identity last week.

item.title: English musical by students staged in Beijing
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: "Silk â¦ The Eternal Road", an English musical by students and teachers of the Asia-Pacific Experimental School of Beijing Normal University, premiered in Beijing on Nov 1.

item.title: Quirky art-house comedy vies with blockbuster rivals
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Somewhat of a Chinese answer to the 2000 Japanese movie Kikujiro, the upcoming comedy Mr Zhu's Summer will open at theaters across the Chinese mainland on Nov 10.

item.title: Phoenix plans string of new TV shows for 2018
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Hong Kong broadcaster Phoenix Satellite Television recently launched a summit in Beijing to gather around 500 experts and insiders to discuss the challenges and opportunities for Chinese enterprises looking to expand abroad.

item.title: Chinese musical 'Shimmer' to hit Broadway
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: The original production "Shimmer" has become the first Chinese musical to have an open-ended run in Broadway starting in 2019.

item.title: Brighten winter with more colors
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Here are some popular color combinations that can make people look more posh in the coming cold days.

item.title: Stefanie Sun holds art exhibition for new album
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Stefanie Sun holds art exhibition for new album

item.title: Chinese actor wins big at Tokyo Film Festival
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Chinese actor Duan Yihong bagged the Best Actor Award at the Tokyo International Film Festival on Friday.

item.title: 'Never Say Die' triumphs at box office
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: To Hollywood's surprise, Chinese films are increasingly enjoying box office success. The Chinese comedy Never Say Die has brought in an impressive 326 million US dollars worldwide to date, marking another triumph after Wolf Warriors II piled up 877 million US dollars box office.

item.title: Opportunities and challenges for the Chinese film industry in the 'new era'
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Against such a backdrop, a symposium titled âStatus quo and the future of the Chinese film industryâ, organized by the School of Arts and Communication of Beijing Normal University, was held in Beijing Nov 1.

item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Actor-singer Yi Yangqianxi poses for the fashion magazine.

item.title: 2017 China Fashion Week: Tencel
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: A model displays a new creation at the fashion show of Tencel by Chen Wen during the China Fashion Week Spring/Summer 2018 in Beijing, China, November 3, 2017.

item.title: 2017 China Fashion Week: Fashion Union
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: A model displays a new creation at the fashion show of Fashion Union by Shang Kunyuan during the China Fashion Week Spring/Summer 2018 in Beijing, China, November 3, 2017.

item.title: 2017 China Fashion Week: Jusere
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: A model displays a new creation at the fashion show of Jusere by Yu Aiping during the China Fashion Week Spring/Summer 2018 in Beijing, China, Nov 3, 2017.

item.title: New clothing brand fuses art into fashion
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: A new fashion brand, Ann Eleven, held its debut show during China Fashion Week on Sunday night at Parkview Green mall in Beijing, with the theme, "Art is in the Air".

item.title: 2018 Spring/Summer fashion trend: Bright-colored eyeshadow
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Believe it or not, eyeshadow really makes sense in a daily facial makeup regimen. But it can either add charisma to the eye or turn you into a fashion disaster.

item.title: 2017 China Fashion Week: Ann Eleven
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Models present creations of Ann Eleven during the China Fashion Week Spring/Summer 2018 in Beijing, China, Nov 5, 2017.

item.title: 2017 China Fashion Week: 95.SY
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: A model displays a new creation at the fashion show of 95.SY by Deng Zhaoping during the China Fashion Week Spring/Summer 2018 in Beijing, China, Nov 5, 2017.

item.title: 2017 China Fashion Week: Maryma
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: A model displays a new creation at the fashion show of Maryma designed by Ma Yanli during the China Fashion Week Spring/Summer 2018 in Beijing, China, Nov 5, 2017.

item.title: New stills of 'Legend of Fu Yao' released
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: The costume drama titled Legend of Fu Yao has received public attention since shooting began.

item.description: Actor Xu Weizhou poses for fashion magazine

item.title: Fashion icon Zhang Ziyi poses for fashion magazine
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Fashion icon Zhang Ziyi poses for the fashion magazine.

item.title: For a stylish journey into the unknown
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Hop on your bike and channel your inner Steve McQueen as you get ready to hit the road â for a stylish journey into the unknown.

item.title: Time of the season
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Spring forward with an awakening and a wardrobe refresh â from fur to florals â courtesy of these five fashion houses.

item.title: Berlin Philharmonic returns to Shanghai with sellout shows
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: All the tickets for the two upcoming Berlin Philharmonic concerts in Shanghai sold out within 26 hours on Sept 17 and 18, a record for a live performance.

item.title: Chinese label kicks off first UK hip-hop show
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Three groups of Chinese hip-hop singers â Guangzhou-born rapper Tizzy T, jazz-hip hop singer Kafe Hu and hip-hop group of twin brothers, OB03 â will perform in a show at the O2 Ritz Manchester in the United Kingdom on Nov 9.

item.title: Joint fashion creations presented at China Fashion Week
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Models present a fashion creation during Asahi Kasei Future Star Innovation Award - Ji Feiyue/ Liu Feng/ Wan Ning Joint Collection at China Fashion Week S/S 2018 in Beijing, capital of China, Nov 3, 2017.

item.title: Creations of LaurÃ¨l staged at China Fashion Week
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Creations of LaurÃ¨l werestaged at China Fashion Week in Nov.

item.title: Briefly
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Two couples from among the herders in China's Inner Mongolia autonomous region have won this year's Loro Piana Cashmere of the Year award, an annual prize given by an Italian fashion company specializing in high-end cashmere and wool products.

item.title: Dong ethnic group celebrates 'Pohui' festival in SW China
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: People of Dong ethnic group perform during a folk festival in Tangchao Village of Dong autonomous county of Sanjiang, South China's Guangxi Zhuang autonomous region, Nov 3, 2017. Local villagers of Dong ethnic group gathered together celebrating a traditional "Pohui" festival.

item.title: Classic tale comes to life
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: From Nov 9 to Jan 13, the Jersey Boys, a hit musical, will tour China visiting Shanghai, Guangzhou and Beijing.

item.title: Chinese orchestra hits high note in US debut
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: A sold-out concert performed here last Saturday by China National Center for the Performing Arts (NCPA) Orchestra caught the attention of the whole audience by showcasing a unique combination of Western and Chinese music.

item.title: Hermes marks China anniversary with unique exhibition
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: To mark the 20th anniversary of Hermes in China, the French luxury house has launched an exhibition called Harnessing the Roots in Shanghai.

item.title: What's on in Beijing (Nov 4-11)
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Discover the best things to do in Beijing with our weekly roundup of art and exhibitions, music and performances, and trending activities to do around town.

item.title: When classical dance meets contemporary art
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: The contemporary dance work Every Moment is currently being staged in Beijing. The piece, led by Hua Xiaoyi, explores the identities of women.

item.title: Actors from China's Ningxia perform in Tanzania
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Actors of Qinqing Arts Troupe from China's Ningxia Hui autonomous region performs at the National Museum and House of Culture in Dar es Salaam, Tanzania on Nov 1, 2017.

item.title: New stills of 'Ruyi's Royal Love in the Palace' released
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: A still shot of Ruyi's Royal Love in the Palace.

item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: A model displays a new creation at the fashion show of Xiang Shang Sport by Huang Jieming during the China Fashion Week Spring/Summer 2018 in Beijing, China, Nov 2, 2017.

item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: A model displays a new creation at the fashion show of Laurel during the China Fashion Week Spring/Summer 2018 in Beijing, China, Nov 2, 2017.

item.title: 2017 China Fashion Week: Bing Chuan
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: A model displays a new creation at the fashion show of Bing Chuan by Xiong Yun during the China Fashion Week Spring/Summer 2018 in Beijing, China, Nov 2, 2017.

item.title: Suzhou ballet troupe takes to Europe
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Romeo and Juliet, which premiered in Kaohsiung, Taiwan, in May 2010, accompanied by the Kaohsiung Symphony Orchestra, was the company's first original full-length ballet work.

item.title: Crime classic forever
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Veteran Hong Kong director John Woo's A Better Tomorrow is still making waves more than three decades after it was made.

item.title: Bridging East and West: Chu Yan's new fashion creations
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Chu Yan, the chief costume designer for leaders of the 2014 APEC meeting, released her new creations during the China Fashion Week in Beijing on Tuesday night.

item.title: Zhao Liying graces Tiffany &amp; Co with fashion shots
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Chinese pop star Zhao Liying has released a series of fashion photos to publicize Tiffany & Co, the world's premier jeweler.

item.title: Singer Stefanie Sun poses for fashion magazine
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Singer Stefanie Sun poses for fashion magazine.

item.title: Singer Li Yuchun to release new album
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Singer Li Yuchun to release new album

item.title: Actress Wang Ou release fashion photos
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Actress Wang Ou release fashion photos.

item.title: 2018 Spring/Summer fashion trend: Floral headbands
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Thereâs never a bad time or season to stock up on hair accessories. Theyâre small and easy to store, making them a super convenient addition to your makeup.

item.title: 2017 China Fashion Week: JD Ã Bebe
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: A model displays a new creation at the fashion show of JD Ã Bebe during the China Fashion Week Spring/Summer 2018 in Beijing, China, November 1, 2017.

item.title: Pop idol Han Geng returns to 'The Ex-file' franchise
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Chinese pop idol Han Geng will return for the finale of The Ex-file franchise, one of the highest-grossing domestic romantic comedy series.

item.title: 2017 China Fashion Week: Eve Cina
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: A model displays a new creation at the fashion show of EVE CINA during the China Fashion Week Spring/Summer 2018 in Beijing, China, 1 November 2017

item.title: Stage set for more outdoor music events
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Starry Asia Entertainment, a Chinese live music production company, announced its latest plans in Beijing recently.

item.title: Japanese writer Keigo's work turned into a Chinese movie
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: One of the most popular Japanese writers in China, Higashino Keigo will see his 2012 novel Miracles of the Namiya General Store adapted into a Chinese movie.

item.title: DC's latest film set to spark renewed rivalry with Marvel
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Around six decades after the birth of Justice League, one of the most famous metahuman alliances in American comics history, an upcoming movie named after the fictional team will bring them to life.

item.title: Swire Properties, Beijing Music Festival bring high art to capital
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Swire Properties is working closely with the annual Beijing Music Festival, supporting and sponsoring high-quality cultural performances in its venues around the capital city.

item.title: Remake, remodel
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Youku is nurturing a big ambition to localize the world's most popular television genres for online viewing.

item.title: Cinematic draw
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Chinese director Jia Zhangke hopes his new film festival will be as much an attraction for tourists to Pingyao as the ancient heritage city.

item.title: Actor Liu Haoran poses for the fashion magazine
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Actor Liu Haoran poses for the fashion magazine.

item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Actress Zhou Dongyu poses for fashion magazine

item.title: Song duo ties the knot in Seoul
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: South Korean actor Song Hye Kyo and actress Song Joong Ki officially tied the knot in Seoul on October 31.

item.title: 2017 China Fashion Week: Idili Silk From Tianshan To The World
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: A model displays a new creation at the fashion show of Idili Silk From Tianshan To The World during the China Fashion Week Spring/Summer 2018 in Beijing, China, October 30, 2017.

item.title: 2017 China Fashion Week: Chu Yan
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: A model displays a new creation at the fashion show of Chu Yan during the China Fashion Week Spring/Summer 2018 in Beijing, China, October 31, 2017.

item.title: Fresh take on Swedish work at drama festival
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Miss Julie, one of Swedish playwright August Strindberg's most representative works written in 1888 and noted for its naturalistic style, has been adapted for the stage as a traditional Chinese opera.

item.title: 2017 China Fashion Week: Creative Draping
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: A model displays a new creation at the fashion show of Creative Draping by Qiu Peina during the China Fashion Week Spring/Summer 2018 in Beijing, China, October 30, 2017.

item.title: Actor Jing Boran poses for the fashion magazine
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Actor Jing Boran poses for the fashion magazine

item.title: Angelababy does zombie cosplay for Halloween
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Angelababy does zombie cosplay for Halloween

item.title: Essence releases latest products
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Germany-based underwear brand Triumph releases its latest collection for Essence in Shanghai on Oct 30. Actress and brand ambassador Liv Tyler shared her views on fashion and modern life with other fashionistas.

item.title: Actress Liu Shishi poses for fashion magazine
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Actress Liu Shishi poses for fashion magazine

item.title: Chinese-Irish girl dances her way to the top
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Small body, big power, a 10-year-old Chinese-Irish girl has taken her ballroom dancing to the top in the international stage.

item.title: 2017 China Fashion Week: Chan Zhe
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Models present creations by Chan Zhe collection during the Mercedes-Benz China Fashion Week in Beijing, China, October 30, 2017.

item.title: Actress Liu Yifei spotted in the film 'Rescuing Flying Tiger'
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Actress Liu Yifei spotted in the film 'Rescuing Flying Tiger'

item.title: Teen actor Wang&nbsp;Yuan poses for fashion magazine
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Teen actor Wang Yuan poses for fashion magazine

item.title: Pop star Dilraba Dilmurat poses for fashion magazine
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Pop star Dilraba Dilmurat poses for fashion magazine

item.title: 2017 China Fashion Week: DHUB 2018 S/S
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: 2017 China Fashion Week(Spring/Summer 2018) was launched in Beijing on Oct 29. The 10-day event will hold more than 110 activities, with "DHUB 2018 S/S" design collection as its highlight.

item.title: 2018 Spring/Summer fashion trend: Puff sleeve
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Often associated with Disney princesses-style or Shakespearean heroines, wedding dresses or royal costumes, puffed sleeves have undergone many transformations in size and shape over the years.

item.title: 41-episode Mission of History set to hit TV screens
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: The 41-episode Lishi de Shiming (Mission of History) will air on Beijing Satellite TV from Oct 28.

item.title: 2017 China Fashion Week: E.Lau
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: A model displays a new creation at the fashion show of E. Lau during the China Fashion Week Spring/Summer 2018 collection in Beijing, China, Oct 29, 2017.

item.title: 2017 China Fashion Week: Ne Tiger
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: A dancer performs with a pipa, a Chinese traditional music instrument during the Ne Tiger haute couture 2018 collection with "The Road" theme in the opening show for the China Fashion

item.title: Trading expo for Chinese films to be held in Fuzhou
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: The 21st Beijing Screenings, jointly hosted by the film bureau of the State Administration of Press, Publication, Radio, Film and Television, the Fujian provincial bureau of Press, Publication, Radio, Film and Television, and the Fuzhou city government, will take place in Fuzhou, capital of Fujian province, from Nov 29 to Dec 2.

item.title: Indian-born composer set to debut work in Beijing
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: In 2009, Guan, the director of the China National Symphony Orchestra, invited Upadhyaya to be the conductor and composer for the Chinese National Orchestra and Chorus.

item.title: Chinese touch to familiar forms
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: The National Center for the Performing Arts Orchestra has begun a six-city tour of North America in which it is performing classical music with characteristics of home.

item.title: Creations staged at Fashion Week in Tbilisi
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: A model presents a creation by Zlatotsveta Petrova from Georgia during the Fashion Week in Tbilisi, capital of Georgia, on Oct 28, 2017.

item.title: Chinese films to be screened at Rwandan film festival
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: The opening of the 13th edition of Rwanda Film Festival was held Friday evening in Kigali, where China, as a guest country, will present five films on the screens.

item.title: Chinese film crowns at 54th International Antalya Film Festival
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Chinese film Angels Wear White won the Best Film Award late Friday at the 54th International Antalya Film Festival in Turkey's Mediterranean City of Antalya, the first time a Chinese film wins the highest award of this event.

item.title: Beijing College Students Drama Festival opens
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: College students perform during the opening ceremony of the 6th Beijing College Students Drama Festival in Beijing, capital of China, Oct 27, 2017.

item.title: Musical tribute to the mainland
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: In 2001, Maksim Mrvica, a Croatian-born classical pianist studying in Paris, gained fame as a promising young musician after winning piano competitions in Europe.

item.title: Classical dancer set to don new garb with contemporary performance
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Hua Xiaoyi, a long-haired beauty, has the image traditionally associated with a Chinese classical dancer. However, the 25-year-old Hua is going against her long career as a Chinese classical dancer and will stage her first contemporary dance work, titled Every Moment, in Beijing on Oct 31 and Nov 1 before heading to Shanghai on Nov 21 and 22.

item.title: What's on in Beijing (Oct 27 â Nov 3)
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Discover the best things to do in Beijing with our weekly roundup of art and exhibitions, music and performances, and trending activities to do around town.

item.title: Star-studded Rome Film Festival kicks off
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Italy's capital city braced for a star-studded event as its 12th film festival kicked off Thursday.

item.title: Peking Opera tour debuts on university campus
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: A university tour of Peking Opera debuted at the University of International Business and Economics in Beijing on Thursday.

item.title: Guangxi folk-rock outfit to play in Beijing
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Mabang, a world music band from Southwest China's Guangxi Zhuang autonomous region, will perform at Beijing's popular indie live music venue Yugong Yishan on Nov 7.

item.title: 2018 Spring/Summer fashion trend: Wet hair style
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: 2018 Spring/Summer fashion trend: Wet hair style

item.title: Guizhou Culture Week opens in Shanghai
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: A gala performance to mark the beginning of Guizhou Culture Week, a part of the China Shanghai International Arts Festival, was held at the Shanghai Grand Theatre on Oct 26.

item.title: What is love? New film could reveal
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: The universal theme of films will be invoked yet again in the upcoming Fight for Love.

item.title: Actress Lin Yun poses for fashion magazine
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Actress Lin Yun poses for fashion magazine

item.title: Actor Huang Xuan spotted in 30th Tokyo International Film Festival
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Chinese actor Huang Xuan takes part in the opening ceremony of the 30th Tokyo International Film Festival.

item.title: Fashion icon Kris Wu poses for the fashion magazine
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Fashion icon Kris Wu poses for the fashion magazine

item.title: Poet in motion
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: A choreographer captures global attention with his radical presence on China's burgeoning contemporary dance scene.

item.title: 30th Tokyo International Film Festival kicks off
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: The 30th Tokyo International Film Festival (TIFF) kicked off Wednesday, with some 200 films to be screened at theaters in Tokyo's downtown Roppongi and other areas in the next 10 days.

item.title: Li Yuchun spotted in upcoming 'Monster Hunt 2'
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Chinese actress-singer Li Yuchun releases a series of photos for her role as Black Phoenix in the film Monster Hunt 2. The film is scheduled to be released in China on February 16, 2018, to coincide with Chinese New Year.

item.title: Teen actor Wang Junkai poses for fashion magazine
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Teen actor Wang Junkai poses for fashion magazine

item.title: 2018 Spring/Summer fashion trend: Circular handbag
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Circular handbags designed by Alice + Olivia during the 2018 Spring/Summer New York Fashion Week

item.title: Yuan Quan and Ma Yili poses for fashion magazine
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Yuan Quan and Ma Yili poses for fashion magazine.

item.title: French director brings life of legendary ocean explorer to big screen
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: On Oct 13, the 46-year-old filmmaker brought his latest biographical adventure movie, The Odyssey, to Beijing and exchanged ideas with Chinese movie-goers.

item.title: Chinese moviegoers need not wait a decade for new 'Blade Runner'
item.author: 中国日报-娱乐
item.description: Many Chinese sci-fi fans watched the 1982 classic Blade Runner at least a decade after the film was released.
